transcript: Hi everyone. I'm Spencer, CEO of Orange Cap Games, parent company to Moonbirds. It's kind of a weird time in crypto right now, isn't it? Um, and I like to go back to first principles when that happens. And so I think one thing that's meaningful to me is, as with many technological innovations, in prior cycles we saw a lot of really rapid tech innovation. Year after year, day after day, month after month, it seemed like the tech was changing. But right now, I think we've seen that plateau in this most recent cycle. Now, this is not a bad thing. This happens with all technological innovations. When the tech plateaus, different things matter. And what matters today in crypto, I'm going to make the argument, is distribution, distribution, distribution. So I want to look at a company that I take a lot of inspiration from because it's one of the best growing companies when it comes to distribution in the Web 2 space. This is Pop Mart. Pop Mart is probably much bigger than many of you think it is. As a matter of fact, Pop Mart is a bigger company than Hasbro, Mattel, and Sanrio. And our goal at Orange Cap Games is to be the Pop Mart of crypto. Now, last year... this year, Pop Mart's on track to do about $4 billion in revenue. We at Orange Cap Games, and we're very proud of this, are on track to do about $8 million in revenue. Now there's a really big gap here, right? But let's look at apples to apples. Actually, in its second year of business, Pop Mart only did $900,000 in revenue. And we are in our second year of operations at $8 million. So we're very proud of that. As a matter of fact, based on current commitments from our distributors, etcetera, next year we're projected to do about $20 million in revenue, which is around where Pop Mart was at two years before it IPO'd. But when you think Pop Mart, many of you probably think Labubu. And this is where IP comes into things. Moonbirds or Birb, our IP, is Crypto's Labubu, and that's what we have to drive and position. Now, don't just take my word for it. Let's look at some data. At... earlier this year, we did $1.7 million US in sales, $25 at a time, of physical blind boxes. If you're at Breakpoint, you can come check them out at our booth. If not, you can go check them out on the internet. We're very proud of this. This was actually the largest RWA primary sale ever, uh, on Solana. Now, not only do we make this product, but much like Pop Mart, we make products with other people's IP. So we also make Vibes, which is the Pudgy Penguins trading card game. This product has done about $6 million in revenue in the last 12 months. Vibes is a global phenomena with thousands of players all over the world, from Singapore to Manila to, uh, to Connecticut, etcetera. We've hosted championship events that have drawn over 130 players to each of them. And one of the things that I'm most proud of is the diversity of players that play in them. Uh, the top eight of our, uh, North American championships included two professional Magic players, two professional Flesh and Blood players, two professional Lorcana players, and two people from crypto who this was their first trading card game. It's things like that that really bring us all together. Now, how do we reach all these people? You may not have heard of Vibes, you may not know about this, and this is because we spend the majority of our efforts marketing outside of the space. Because that's where the marginal consumer exists. We're really proud to be distributed by many major distributors, uh, from the traditional trading card space. GTS, the largest sports card distributor in North America, distributes our products. E-Vent, the largest Funko Pop distributor in North America, distributes our products. And Star City Games, the largest Magic: The Gathering distributor in North America, also distributes our products. Not only that, but we've partnered with many of the industry titans. CGC, the second largest grading company in the world, is a partner of ours. We've also done official partnerships with PSA, who distributed our co-branded card at New York Comic Con as well as San Diego Comic Con. And we've done partnerships with eBay as well. Not only that, but we've looked outside of the collectible space. We've partnered with Jarritos and VanEck and everyone in between. On top of that, you might say, 'Well, how big is this on the secondary market?' It's actually quite large. Earlier this year, one of our cards sold for $12,200 on Goldin Auctions, one of the largest auction houses in the collectible space. For context, this is kind of the same price as the first printing of Charizard or also a Black Lotus, uh, from Unlimited. So this is quite a meaningful sale, not only in the scope of crypto, but in the scope of kind of everywhere else. Now, I just spent a while talking about a Pudgy Penguins product that we produce, but I mentioned that, you know, we are a company that owns Moonbirds. And internally we've had this mantra which we're starting to put out more, which is 'All roads lead to birb'. And I'm so excited to announce for the first time at Breakpoint that this coming year, the Birb IP will be joining the Vibes TCG product. This is a really exciting step for us forward, uh, in the physical collectible space. But also, like, we're at a crypto conference, right? And so let's talk a little bit more about digital distribution as well. Not only do we make physical collectibles, we also make digital collectibles. This year, almost 200,000 unique wallets have minted a Moonbirds, uh, digital collectible Soulbound Token into their wallet. Spreading our IP across, uh, a hun- 196,000 unique wallets. Which is an incredible and exciting stat for how we're spreading both inside and outside the space. Now, as many of you know, we announced in Singapore, uh, that we had a token coming to Solana soonish. So I'm excited to share, uh, that we... a little bit more clarity on that point. Which is that ticker $birb, our native token, is coming early Q1 in 2026. Uh, as we pursue growing towards being a multi-billion dollar company doing billions of dollars of revenue like Pop Mart does, being the Pop Mart of Web 3, we're so excited for this major development in our journey. Thank you so much, uh, for joining us on the road to birbillions, and I hope you guys have a rest... great rest of Breakpoint.

enrichment.generated_query: Moonbirds Orange Cap Games Solana Breakpoint 2025 official announcement blog technical docs

sources.title: Nansen Points Permissionless Rewards: Moonbirds Soulbound Token | Nansen
sources.snippet:
# Nansen Points Permissionless Rewards: Moonbirds Soulbound Token

Published on

Nov 11, 2025

Tag:

mins

[Nansen Intern](https://www.nansen.ai/authors/nansen-intern)

We’re excited to welcome Moonbirds as the next collaborator in our Permissionless Rewards program. They are our first collaborator for Season 02, but third overall during the Points program.

### Table of Contents

[Text Link](https://www.nansen.ai/www.nansen.ai)

Nansen Points just got you into something special.

We’re excited to welcome [Moonbirds](https://minting.moonbirds.com/landingpage) as the next collaborator in our Permissionless Rewards program. They are our first collaborator for Season 02, but third overall during the Points program.

Third-party projects can seamlessly distribute token allocations and exclusive experiences directly to eligible Points holders. Essentially, your Points become your passport to the broader crypto ecosystem.

## Moonbirds x Permissionless Rewards

If you’ve been in the NFT space for more than five minutes, you already know about Moonbirds.

They helped set the standard during the last cycle, and now they’re building a new phase of their ecosystem.

We are excited to introduce Nansen Points holders into the Moonbirds ecosystem.

### Here’s What You Get

Starting November 11, 2025, all active Nansen Points holders can claim a unique Moonbirds SBT—based on their Points tier.

Snapshot was taken on November 11 at 9am EST.

There are four custom tokens, one for each tier: Green, Ice, North, and Star.

These SBTs are non-transferable, non-tradable, and fully yours.

Think of it as your membership pass to the Moonbirds ecosystem.

### How to Claim

Head to the Nansen Points dashboard and connect your wallet.

If you hold any of the above mentioned tiers, you’ll be able to mint your SBT in a single click here: [https://minting.moonbirds.com/landingpage](https://minting.moonbirds.com/landingpage)

That’s it.

No points will be deducted. No additional requirements. Just one more way your onchain activity earns real utility.

### Why Permissionless Rewards?

Nansen Points were built to recognize loyal users — not just clicks and referrals. With [Permissionless Rewards](https://academy.nansen.ai/articles/2154465-about-permissionless-rewards), we’re giving top users access to interesting projects that are aligned with that same vision.

_The Moonbirds SBT is the first of several upcoming Permissionless Rewards that will only be available to Points holders._

_And yes — each one is designed to be worth your time._

You’ve earned your Points. Now go claim your reward.

sources.title: Bitcoin Munari Breaks Barriers With Solana-Based Launch and $0.10 Initial Round Price
sources.snippet:
[Accessibility: Skip TopNav](https://www.globenewswire.com/www.globenewswire.com#maincontainer)

# Bitcoin Munari Breaks Barriers With Solana-Based Launch and $0.10 Initial Round Price

November 22, 2025 07:00 ET\| Source:
[Bitcoin Munari](https://www.globenewswire.com/en/search/organization/Bitcoin%2520Munari)Bitcoin Munari

_Bitcoin Munari’s public presale is underway at a $0.10 initial round price as the project activates its Solana-based launch framework and advances its multi-stage development roadmap._

HELSINKI, Nov. 22, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Bitcoin Munari is progressing through its public presale at an initial access price of $0.10, initiating the first round of a ten-stage distribution model that extends to the SPL release on January 20, 2026. The active phase introduces BTCM within a Solana environment designed to support early transaction execution, presale distribution, and community onboarding ahead of the project’s migration to an independent Layer-1 chain in 2027.

**Solana Deployment Establishes Operational Starting Point**

Bitcoin Munari’s first phase centers on the Solana network, leveraging its execution performance and ecosystem tooling to anchor the project’s initial functionality. The SPL deployment provides low-latency settlement, predictable transaction conditions, and a consistent entry environment for presale participants.

This foundation supports the initial stages of the multi-year roadmap and aligns with the MUNARI principles — Modern, Unified, Network, Autonomous, Resilient, Infrastructure — which define the system’s long-horizon architectural structure.

**Presale Structure Organized Around Fixed, Transparent Pricing**

The presale allocates 53% of the project’s 21 million BTCM supply across ten rounds ranging from $0.10 to $3.00. Round 1 remains active at $0.10, followed by sequential price increases through each subsequent stage.

All presale tokens unlock at the time of the SPL launch on January 20, 2026, without vesting schedules or delayed release intervals. This approach preserves clear pricing boundaries and ensures the entire distribution operates under the same fixed-supply model outlined in the project documentation.

**Integration Framework Guides Transition to Mainnet**

Development continues toward the public testnet scheduled for 2026, which will introduce validator onboarding, performance benchmarking, delegated staking simulations, and verification of the Solana-to-Mainnet migration bridge.

The migration process will use a 1:1 exchange mechanism enabling SPL tokens to transition to native BTCM once the Layer-1 chain launches in 2027.

_“A structured, multi-phase design gives each part of the system a defined function before it becomes part of the mainnet,”_ a Bitcoin Munari spokesperson said. _“The Solana deployment provides immediate operational support, while the upcoming testnet offers the environment needed for system-wide evaluation.”_

**Multi-Network Architecture Differentiates Project Model**

Bitcoin Munari’s operational sequence separates token distribution, early ecosystem access, and long-term network governance into distinct phases.

The Solana environment manages initial issuance and liquidity, while the dedicated Layer-1 chain will introduce consensus controls, validator governance, native smart contract execution, and protocol-level privacy tools.

This strategy contrasts with single-chain deployments that consolidate distribution and long-term operations within a single release.

**Independent Assessments Reinforce Early-Stage Transparency**

Technical components associated with the Solana deployment have undergone external review. Completed assessments include the [Solidproof](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=pgS9H-Q-hcMI0uhRaeVdZNiHsR-bkzNcr9EikU_rCz0CEECTTiRmJluX5rm5GUn5g0fZxEKvmETWhaKAgA5Jboprd9zBpiFKnbZntnPXOno5_9CQ2ivXfMAJx7ihN_Jm) smart contract audit, the [Spy Wolf](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=sv719ORKaUaGNB4hhJwSaabT9mEx-Nh

sources.title: Infrastructure Breakthrough as Bitcoin Munari Completes First Solana-to-Mainnet Integration Framework
sources.snippet:
[Accessibility: Skip TopNav](https://www.globenewswire.com/www.globenewswire.com#maincontainer)

# Infrastructure Breakthrough as Bitcoin Munari Completes First Solana-to-Mainnet Integration Framework

November 20, 2025 12:00 ET\| Source:
[Bitcoin Munari](https://www.globenewswire.com/en/search/organization/Bitcoin%2520Munari)Bitcoin Munari

_Bitcoin Munari’s public presale is underway at the initial price of $0.35 as the project details the first iteration of its Solana-to-Mainnet integration framework, marking a key milestone in its multi-phase technical roadmap._

HELSINKI, Finland, Nov. 20, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Bitcoin Munari is progressing through its public presale at the initial $0.01 round, part of a ten-stage distribution cycle that runs through the project’s January 20, 2026 SPL token release. The presale phase coincides with the completion of the project’s first Solana-to-Mainnet integration framework, establishing the structural foundation for its transition to an independent Layer-1 blockchain in 2027.

**Solana Integration Framework Establishes Transition Structure**

Bitcoin Munari’s initial deployment on Solana provides an execution environment for early operations, liquidity access, and user onboarding. The newly completed integration framework outlines the technical path connecting this phase to the upcoming mainnet, including migration logic, validator-side tools, and token-mapping systems.

The broader roadmap aligns with the MUNARI principles — Modern, Unified, Network, Autonomous, Resilient, Infrastructure — which define the project’s long-term architectural direction.

**Presale Progress Anchored in Fixed-Supply Distribution**

The ongoing presale distributes 53% of the total supply across ten fixed-price rounds ranging from $0.1 to $3.00. All allocations release simultaneously on January 20, 2026, when the SPL token goes live on Solana.

A capped supply of 21 million BTCM underpins the model, ensuring that each round follows the predetermined pricing schedule and that distribution remains limited, transparent, and consistent throughout the presale period.

**Roadmap Advances Toward 2026 Public Testnet**

Development continues toward a public testnet planned for 2026, which will include validator onboarding, stress testing, and evaluation of the migration bridge between Solana and the mainnet. Testnet participants will have access to validator software, performance tools, and cross-chain migration functions.

_“The integration framework gives us a defined pathway from the Solana phase to the Layer-1 deployment,” a Bitcoin Munari spokesperson said. “Each stage is structured to ensure continuity between the initial token operations and the independent blockchain that follows.”_

**Structural Model Defines Transition Between Networks**

Bitcoin Munari’s architecture adopts a staged sequence rather than a single-chain launch. Initial token operations, distribution processes, and early liquidity take place on Solana, while governance, consensus, and execution shift to the dedicated Layer-1 network in 2027.

The migration mechanism uses a 1:1 conversion model, allowing SPL tokens to be exchanged for native BTCM once the mainnet becomes available. The separation of phases enables each component to mature independently before forming the unified system.

**Development Oversight Enhanced Through Independent Reviews**

Technical components associated with the Solana deployment have undergone external evaluation. Third-party assessments include the [Solidproof](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=BtW4puRN3DMONP7kHHuMyBPVCGzn7YL9GWFzHoybHhMc_yqFuCSyyPrWgTJYTulKGvjRpcPPWTJYC5m1DoK8BqGm0KgFQsmyDiJLITw9b4IVhbbqIRF8p1MnyNi4T6VC) smart contract audit, the [Spy Wolf](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=6i31MkC_vRgN39c-c0oWXd-xM6gRBfZQkewoLsmvGr3LU3oR3LZHP_x9bAsaTkNzB-jWlAR1EhH8yA58uq0B03x9iTApq9QvuROx-W-5XrHW8L7NOBiGVZ-lrWOHwtjfa_dBRcaRXwhyG1LG-Pj6EAHeuOkiw-LTe9S90o7Ifz4=) audit, and the [Spy Wolf KYC ve

editorial.headline: Moonbirds Parent Orange Cap Games Targets Q1 2026 for $BIRB Token Launch on Solana
editorial.standfirst: CEO Spencer Gordon-Sand outlines a 'Pop Mart' strategy to bridge physical retail with on-chain liquidity, signaling a pivot from pure NFT IP to mass-market distribution.
key_takeaways: Token Launch: Native ticker $BIRB confirmed for Early Q1 2026 deployment on Solana.
Financials: Orange Cap Games reports $8M annual revenue, projecting $20M for next fiscal year.
Distribution: Moonbirds IP will join the 'Vibes' TCG, leveraging retail channels like GTS and Star City Games.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
In a crowded market of infrastructure plays, **Orange Cap Games** is betting that the infrastructure war is over and the distribution war has begun. During his keynote at Solana Breakpoint 2025, CEO Spencer Gordon-Sand argued that crypto has reached a "technological plateau," shifting the sector's imperative from protocol innovation to consumer acquisition. His thesis relies on a direct comparison to **Pop Mart**, the Asian toy giant generating $4 billion annually. While Orange Cap’s current $8 million revenue pales in comparison to that figure, its year-over-year growth trajectory mirrors Pop Mart’s early operational years, suggesting a calculated play to industrialize Web3 IP for mass retail.

The firm’s strategy rests on proving that crypto-native IP can survive on shelves next to Magic: The Gathering and Pokémon. The data suggests this is more than aspirational: their **Pudgy Penguins**-branded TCG, "Vibes," generated $6 million in revenue over the last 12 months, penetrating traditional distribution networks including **GTS** and **E-Vent**. This is critical "alpha" for investors looking for non-speculative revenue streams; the company is not relying on wash-trading volume but on physical unit sales in comic shops and retail outlets from Singapore to Connecticut. The integration of **Moonbirds** IP into this existing TCG engine effectively transforms the collection from a static JPEG asset into a playable retail product with established logistical rails.

The keynote’s most significant forward-looking statement was the confirmation of the **$BIRB** token, slated for an early Q1 2026 launch on Solana. This marks the financialization of their physical strategy, creating a liquid vehicle to capture the value generated by their retail expansion. With 200,000 unique wallets already holding Moonbirds Soulbound Tokens (SBTs), the company has pre-seeded its user base. For institutional observers, the play here is clear: Orange Cap Games is attempting to build a vertically integrated consumer brand where physical sales drive on-chain activity, validating the "click-to-brick" thesis on a venture scale.
